hero.headline: Triangle's Most Trusted Pool Experts
hero.subheadline: For over 20 years, Raleigh-Durham families have counted on our CPO-certified technicians to keep their pools pristine. From weekly cleaning to complex repairs, we handle everything so you can just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> the Triangle's Top Pros
services.subtitle: From routine maintenance to major renovations, our certified team has the expertise and manufacturer-backed warranties to keep your pool in perfect condition year-round.

cards.title: Weekly & Bi-Weekly Cleaning
cards.description: Skimming, vacuuming, brushing, tile cleaning, and precise chemical balancing. Bi-weekly clients get complimentary equipment checks on off weeks.

cards.title: Repairs & Equipment
cards.description: Variable speed pumps, filters, heaters, automation, salt systems, and LED lighting. Pentair & Zodiac authorized warranty station with 3-year coverage.

cards.title: Pool Inspections
cards.description: Comprehensive residential and commercial inspections covering structure, safety, equipment, electrical, water chemistry, and electronic leak detection.

cards.title: Safety Covers
cards.description: Custom-measured, factory-manufactured safety covers with professional installation. Retractable deck anchors protect your family and pets all winter long.

cards.title: Vinyl Liner Replacement
cards.description: Expert inground liner replacement including drainage, wall prep, bottom re-troweling, new fittings, and VGB-compliant drains. One-year workmanship warranty.

cards.title: Seasonal Opening & Closing
cards.description: Full-service spring startup and winterization. We handle cover removal, equipment startup, chemical treatment, blowouts, and everything in between.

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Inspection
steps.description: Call us or fill out the form. We will visit your pool, assess its condition, and give you an honest, no-pressure quote within 24 hours.

steps.title: Our CPO Team Gets to Work
steps.description: Your assigned certified technician arrives on schedule with professional-grade equipment. Cleaning, chemistry, repairs, whatever your pool needs is handled.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy Your Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready all season. With our 3-year warranty and satisfaction guarantee, you have complete peace of mind.

about.label: Why Triangle Families Trust Us
about.headline: 20 Years of Certified Pool Excellence in Raleigh-Durham
about.description: Since 2004, Pool Specialists has been the Triangle's go-to pool contractor. Our entire team holds CPO certification through the Pool and Hot Tub Alliance, and we are the region's most technologically advanced pool service. As an authorized warranty station for both Pentair and Zodiac, we provide manufacturer-backed repairs with 3-year warranties on most parts and labor. We have earned the trust of over 1,000 families by treating every customer fairly and honestly.

features.title: Manufacturer-Authorized Service
features.description: Primary warranty station for Pentair and Fluidra/Zodiac/Jandy/Polaris. Your repairs are backed by the brands that built the equipment.

features.title: 3-Year Parts & Labor Warranty
features.description: We stand behind our work with industry-leading warranties. Most parts and labor are covered for a full three years.

features.title: Continuous Technician Training
features.description: Our team trains through manufacturer partnerships and in-house education programs. We even teach CPO certification classes to the public.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every quote is honest and detailed. We explain what your pool needs and why, so you never pay for services you do not need.

guarantee.headline: Our "Pride in Every Pool" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will come back to make it right at no additional charge. With our A+ BBB rating and 20 years of honest service, your satisfaction is not just a promise, it is our reputation.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients in the Raleigh-Durham area are on schedule within one week. We will start with a thorough inspection so our CPO-certified techs know exactly what your pool needs from day one.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Every single technician on our team is a Certified Pool Operator licensed through the Pool and Hot Tub Alliance. In fact, our staff teaches CPO certification classes to other professionals in the industry.

faqs.question: What brands of equipment do you service?
faqs.answer: We service all major brands, and we are an authorized primary warranty station for both Pentair and Fluidra/Zodiac/Jandy/Polaris. This means manufacturer-backed repairs with 3-year warranties on most parts and labor.

faqs.question: Do you offer pool inspections for home buyers?
faqs.answer: Yes, we perform comprehensive residential inspections covering the pool structure, equipment, electrical systems, safety devices, fencing, and water chemistry. We also offer electronic leak detection.

faqs.question: What areas in the Triangle do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Raleigh, Durham, Cary, Apex, Chapel Hill, Carrboro, Pittsboro, Knightdale, Garner, Wake Forest, Youngsville, Oxford, Lake Gaston, and surrounding communities throughout the Triangle.

testimonials.name: Community Pool Mgr.
testimonials.text: They have been very responsive, very fair, and just done a great job maintaining our community pools. Highly professional service from start to finish.

testimonials.name: Nextdoor Neighbor
testimonials.text: Wonderful and caring staff who are very knowledgeable and experienced. Their pricing is reasonable and I highly recommend them to anyone in the Raleigh area.

testimonials.name: Long-Time Client
testimonials.text: Great service, awesome people, and happy to help you out in any way possible. I have enjoyed their service and the special care they give us every single visit.
